setup.ollama_empty: Reachable at {{url}}, but no models installed
setup.generate_skip_ollama: Ollama not reachable — inference test skipped
setup.registry_empty: No models in registry yet — import from Ollama

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Writes, edits, and refactors code in the workspace.

reviewer.name: Reviewer
reviewer.description: Reviews code quality, bugs, and best practices.

architect.name: Architect
architect.description: Plans system structure, modules, and interfaces.

documentation.name: Documentation
documentation.description: Creates and maintains documentation and technical writing.

project_manager.name: Project Manager
project_manager.description: Coordinates agents, involves the user when needed, delivers results.

software_tester.name: Software Tester
software_tester.description: Designs test cases, runs tests, and reports quality issues.

security.name: Security Engineer
security.description: Reviews code and architecture for security vulnerabilities.

devops.name: DevOps Engineer
devops.description: Handles CI/CD, deployment scripts, and infrastructure automation.

settings_test.default_model_skip: Default model is not an Ollama model — check skipped
settings_test.default_model_ok: Default model {{model}} is installed on Ollama
settings_test.default_model_missing: Default model {{model}} is not installed on Ollama
settings_test.default_model_cloud_missing_key: Default model {{model}} requires a {{provider}} API key
settings_test.cloud_inference_skip: Default model is not a cloud model — inference test skipped
settings_test.cloud_inference_no_key: Default model {{model}} requires a {{provider}} API key
settings_test.registry_skip: No models in registry — import from Ollama first
settings_test.registry_all_ok: All {{count}} registry model(s) are available on Ollama
settings_test.registry_missing: {{missing}} of {{total}} registry model(s) missing on Ollama: {{models}}
settings_test.summary_ok: Model access OK — all checks passed
settings_test.summary_partial: Ollama reachable — some optional checks need attention
settings_test.summary_fail: Cannot reach Ollama or models are unavailable
settings_test.litellm_import_hint: Try: pip install --force-reinstall litellm in backend/.venv
settings_test.readiness_fail: Models are not ready for chat
